title: Dragon Eye
description:
The Dragon Eye Mod adds two new villagers to the Isle of Berk mod

I am still new to modding so this is all I can add for now but I have already planned 1 new Dimension and 3 New structures.
body:
**REQUIRES ISLE OF BERK MOD**
------------------------------------------------------------------
Additions

 2 new Villagers
 
-Dragon Egg Merchant (Place a Dragon egg near a villager)

-Dragon Tamer (Place a Dragon Head near a Villager)

NOTE
Dragon Eye and Lenses will come out once I find someone to texture them
